answers: Learn graphic design: understand typography, color theory, layout, and composition. Practice with Canva (free) or Adobe Suite.
Design basics: balance, contrast, hierarchy, alignment, repetition, proximity. These principles guide every good design.
Tools: Canva (free, easy), Figma (free, professional), Adobe Illustrator/Photoshop (industry standard). Start with Canva.
Design shekha tips: daily practice koro, Behance/Dribbble theke inspiration nao, tutorials dekho, ar feedback chao.
